metadata.ProductName: Cursor Mirror トレースツール
Cursor Mirror トレースツール

gained_last2_fixed_gain.csharp_complexity: very low; keep previous poll point/time and multiply velocity by horizon and gain

piecewise_gain_table.csharp_complexity: low; compute speed/horizon bin and read a small readonly gain table

conservative_risk_gate.csharp_complexity: low-medium; add high-risk predicate and fallback-to-baseline table entries

ridge_residual.csharp_complexity: medium; normalize 18 features and two dot products, plus residual clipping

decision.criteria: A correction must clear at least 0.01 px validation and test mean improvement while preserving p95/p99/max and keeping >1px regressions no worse than improvements; tiny mean gains are not productizable.
decision.recommendation: Use baseline + DWM-aware next-vblank horizon unless more traces show a stable conservative correction.
